title: T-049 — Warehouse GRN desktop UI surfaces
prompt:
# T-049 — Warehouse GRN desktop UI surfaces

PRD: `docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Implement GRN from PO wizard, GRN from TO modal, GRN list, and GRN detail with prototype parity.

## Implementation contract
Build the multi-LP per PO line workflow exactly as the UX specifies: manual row entry, GS1 scan auto-fill cues, per-row batch/expiry/location, review and complete, success/error states, and TO transit-to-destination receiving.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/grn/** [create]
- apps/web/components/warehouse/grn/** [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Receive from PO opens, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx label grn_from_po_wizard, then the 3-step flow and multi-LP row table match prototype structure and copy.
2. Given a TO receive modal opens, when an LP is checked as received, then Destination Location is required and visible inline as in grn_from_to_modal.
3. Given GRN list/detail render, then routes, filters, LP created links, export controls, and empty/error states match prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx.
4. Given components are inspected, then data-prototype-label markers exist for grn_from_po_wizard, grn_from_to_modal, grn_list_page, and grn_detail_page.

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright tests for PO wizard step transitions and required field failures.
- GREEN: component tests for multi-row add/remove, over/under-receipt warnings, and GS1 parsed badges.
- Run pnpm playwright test --grep @warehouse-grn-ui and pnpm test.

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-split a PO line; operator-entered rows are authoritative.
- Do not auto-complete GRNs without explicit Complete Receipt.
- Do not create new LPs for normal TO receive when source LPs already exist.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: rule_registry, warehouses/locations/printers, feature flags, tenant security policy
PO/TO/WO read models, RM root reservations, WO release/cancel hooks
LP lookup, barcode validation, lock protocol, FEFO suggestion, consume-to-WO
WO material consumption and output LP creation events
